textContent: A polar bear stands on a melting glacier, surrounded by icy waters. Thick gray clouds fill the overcast sky, while a massive fire blazes behind the bear, sending dark smoke into the air, creating a stark and eerie contrast.
title: Eisbär auf schlloe und oiel Brand dahinter
textContentHtml: A polar bear stands on a melting glacier, surrounded by icy waters. Thick gray clouds fill the overcast sky, while a massive fire blazes behind the bear, sending dark smoke into the air, creating a stark and eerie contrast.
